PRIVACY POLICY

Last updated: 9/3/2026

TL;DR: We don't spy on you. We don't sell your data. We're not creepy.

WHAT WE COLLECT

Only what we need to build your site and nothing more:

  • Your name and contact info (obviously)
  • Project requirements and content
  • Payment information (processed by Stripe)
  • Basic analytics (page views, not your life story)

WHAT WE DON'T COLLECT

We're not Facebook. We don't need to know:

  • Your browsing history
  • Your location (unless you tell us)
  • Your social media activity
  • Your shoe size (seriously, why would we?)

HOW WE USE IT

Your data has one job:

  • Build your WordPress site
  • Send you invoices
  • Answer your questions
  • Improve our services (not sell you stuff)

WHO WE SHARE WITH

Nobody. Zero. Zilch. Nada.

We don't sell, rent, or trade your information. The only exceptions:

  • If the law requires it (with a valid warrant)
  • To protect our rights (if you try to hack us)
  • Service providers (Stripe for payments, that's it)

COOKIES & TRACKING

We use cookies like a normal website:

  • Essential cookies (to make the site work)
  • Analytics cookies (to see what pages you visit)
  • No creepy tracking cookies
  • No selling your data to advertisers

YOUR RIGHTS

Your data, your rules:

  • Request a copy of your data
  • Ask us to delete it
  • Tell us to stop using it
  • Port it somewhere else

Just email us. We'll handle it within 30 days.

SECURITY

We protect your data like it's our own:

  • SSL encryption everywhere
  • Secure servers (not Bob's basement)
  • Regular security audits
  • Strong passwords (no "password123")

THE BRUTAL TRUTH

We're developers, not data brokers.

We build WordPress sites. We don't build surveillance capitalism. Your privacy matters because trust matters.

If this changes (it won't), we'll tell you 30 days in advance.

Privacy questions? Data requests? General paranoia?

EMAIL US � CONTACT FORM �
